description: Use with POST /admin/push?duplicate=true. Sends the same messageId twice — Cloud Pub/Sub is at-least-once, never exactly-once. Your webhook handler must be idempotent: processing rev_new_001 twice must not create two DB rows, queue two Celery tasks, or send two reply emails. 10 pre-existing reviews are included so the handler fetches real data before hitting the idempotency check.

profile.description: Atlanta's premier functional fitness studio. Olympic lifting, CrossFit-style WODs, and 1-on-1 coaching. No contracts.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev001
200000001.comment: Amazing facilities! The Olympic platform area is the best in Atlanta. Coaches are knowledgeable and push you to your limit in the best way.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks Oscar! Our coaching team works hard to challenge every member. See you at the 6am WOD! 💪

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev002
200000001.comment: Great coaching, clean gym, solid equipment. The programming is smart — progressive overload built into the weekly structure. Community is welcoming to newcomers.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev003
200000001.comment: Been training here 18 months. PRd my deadlift last month — 315 lbs. The coaches tracked my form for months before letting me push heavy. They care about longevity, not just numbers.

reviewReply.comment: Quinn, 315 is HUGE! Eighteen months of smart training pays off. Onward to 365! 🏋️

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev004
200000001.comment: Good gym but very crowded during peak hours (6-8pm weekdays). Hard to get on the platforms. Wish they offered a peak-hours cap on attendance.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev005
200000001.comment: Nutrition coaching as an add-on was a game changer. Lost 18 lbs in 12 weeks while adding muscle. The holistic approach here is rare in a gym environment.

reviewReply.comment: Sam, 18 lbs and gaining muscle is exactly what we aim for — body recomposition done right. We're so proud of you! 🥗

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev006
200000001.comment: Clean showers, good lockers, respectful community. The towel service is a nice premium touch. Pricing is fair for Atlanta considering the quality of equipment.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev007
200000001.comment: Signed up for a free trial class, wasn't told until after that my card would be charged for the second month automatically. Read the fine print, I know — but a heads-up would have been honest.

reviewReply.comment: Ulrich, you're right — our trial-to-membership transition should be crystal clear upfront. We've updated our onboarding script to walk every trialist through the billing terms explicitly.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev008
200000001.comment: Best WOD programming I've encountered across 5 different CrossFit-style gyms. The coaches scale appropriately for different ability levels so nobody is left behind or held back.

reviewReply.comment: Vera, scalable programming for every athlete is our non-negotiable. Thanks for recognizing it! 🔥

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev009
200000001.comment: Open gym hours 5am-11pm are a huge perk. Flexible enough for shift workers and early birds. Equipment availability during off-peak is excellent.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev010
200000001.comment: Joined after having a baby and the postpartum reintroduction program was thoughtful and well-designed. Never felt rushed back. Coaches understood my body was recalibrating.

reviewReply.comment: Xena, postpartum fitness is one of the most important journeys we support. You should be incredibly proud of yourself. We're honored to be part of it. 💛

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev_new_001
200000001.comment: Just left my first class — absolutely blown away. Signed up for a 3-month block on the spot. Best decision of my week.
